THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE AS TO BOTH CLAIM AND CROSS--CLAIM. "CASE SETTLED. DEFENDANT MICHAEL REYNOLDS WAS IMPROPER DEFENDANT AND IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE FROM THE CASE", PER PRO TEM JUDGE DAVID LAVINE. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (2) WERE PRESENT.
